case_title: DIPAK PATEL VS. RULOFO GARCIA et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PATEL, DIPAK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GARCIA, RULOFO THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 30 SYCAMORE STREET #30, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94110, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT GARCIA, RULOFO
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT GARCIA, RULOFO
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, DIPAK AS TO DEFENDANT GARCIA, RULOFO DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, DIPAK SERVED AUG-04-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT GARCIA, RULOFO
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT GARCIA, RULOFO
